channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2765] rw.c:1295:ll_readpage()) ASSERTION( !ll_i2info(vmpage->mapping->host)->lli_has_smd ) failed
item.description:
This hits once hsm swap patch lands: http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,4507
Upgrade to blocker once lands.

[ 2054.325657] LustreError: 21620:0:(lov_object.c:183:lov_init_sub()) header@ffff880064321ec0[0x0, 2, [0x240000400:0x2d05:0x0] hash]{

[ 2054.347500] 
[ 2054.364643] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

crashdump and modules are in /exports/crashdumps/192.168.10.210-2013-02-04-02\:51\:57

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment:
Just had it happen again:

[205454.346773] LustreError: 407:0:(rw.c:1302:ll_readpage()) ASSERTION( !ll_i2info(vmpage->mapping->host)->lli_has_smd ) failed: 
[205454.347991] LustreError: 407:0:(rw.c:1302:ll_readpage()) LBUG
[205454.348271] Pid: 407, comm: cat
[205454.348502] 
[205454.348502] Call Trace:
[205454.348935]  [<ffffffffa0d07915>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
[205454.349260]  [<ffffffffa0d07f17>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]
[205454.349566]  [<ffffffffa08700f5>] ll_readpage+0x1e5/0x1f0 [lustre]
[205454.349858]  [<ffffffff81113d35>] generic_file_aio_read+0x215/0x740
[205454.350165]  [<ffffffffa089aef9>] vvp_io_read_start+0x259/0x470 [lustre]
[205454.350493]  [<ffffffffa0f77f4a>] cl_io_start+0x6a/0x140 [obdclass]
[205454.350800]  [<ffffffffa0f7c5b4>] cl_io_loop+0xb4/0x1b0 [obdclass]
[205454.351104]  [<ffffffffa08448d3>] ll_file_io_generic+0x223/0x570 [lustre]
[205454.351411]  [<ffffffffa0844d5f>] ll_file_aio_read+0x13f/0x2c0 [lustre]
[205454.351714]  [<ffffffffa08458fc>] ll_file_read+0x16c/0x2a0 [lustre]
[205454.352057]  [<ffffffff8117b9e5>] vfs_read+0xb5/0x1a0
[205454.352381]  [<ffffffff8117bb21>] sys_read+0x51/0x90
[205454.352707]  [<ffffffff8100b0f2>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
[205454.353053] 
[205454.433579] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

Crashdump and modules in /exports/crashdumps/192.168.10.220-2013-02-22-08\:37\:58/
